questions.question: If the area of the triangle with vertices $(2, 5), (7, k)$ and $(3, 1)$ is 10, then find the value of $k$.
If $k = p + q + r$, then the value of $\begin{vmatrix} k+r & p & q \\ r & k+p & q \\ r & p & k+q \end{vmatrix}$ is ______.

If maximum and minimum values of $D = \begin{vmatrix} 1 & -\cos\theta & -1 \\ \cos\theta & 1 & -\cos\theta \\ 1 & \cos\theta & 1 \end{vmatrix}$ are $p$ and $q$ respectively, then the value of $2p + 3q$ is _____.
If $x^4 + y^4 + z^4 = 0$ then $\begin{vmatrix} 1 & xy & yz \\ zx & 1 & xy \\ yz & zx & 1 \end{vmatrix} = ...........$ (where $x, y, z \in R$)

If $\begin{vmatrix} 1+x & 1 & 1 \\ 1+y & 1+2y & 1 \\ 1+z & 1+z & 1+3z \end{vmatrix} = 10Kxyz(3 + \frac{1}{x} + \frac{1}{y} + \frac{1}{z})$, then $K=...........$ (Where $xyz \neq 0; 3 + \frac{1}{x} + \frac{1}{y} + \frac{1}{z} \neq 0$).

If $A = \begin{bmatrix} 0 & 1 & 2 \\ 1 & 2 & 3 \\ 3 & 1 & 1 \end{bmatrix}$ and inverse of $A$ is $\frac{1}{2} \begin{bmatrix} 1 & -1 & 1 \\ -8 & 6 & -2 \\ x & -3 & 1 \end{bmatrix}$ then $x = $ ____________.
